content: X01 rules: Start score 301/401/501. Each visit = up to 3 darts. Score subtracts thrown value. Bust conditions (Double Out): (1) remaining<0, (2) remaining=1 (no double for 1), (3) remaining=0 but last dart is not a double/Bull. On bust: revert entire visit, pass turn. Win condition: remaining=0 AND last dart is double or Bull (Double Out) or any segment (Single Out). Leg starter alternates each leg. Set winner = first to win N legs. Match winner = first to win N sets (or N legs if sets disabled). Bull-off sets first-leg throwing order for first leg only.
